insight: Centurion with a chill-producing opponent unit that applies multiple freezes per turn (e.g., 6 freeze sources) can be rendered largely ineffective; however the interaction is considered similar in magnitude to Endotherm Kit, and a player going Centurion against such chill would effectively suffer 2 frostbite-equivalents per turn from the opposing unit.
author: liadahlia
context: Discussion of a hypothetical custom unit that could freeze a Centurion, comparing its chill impact to Endotherm Kit.
